title: stellaria nemorum var. montana
intro: Stellaria nemorum var. montana, also known as mountain starwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Caryophyllaceae family, characterized by its small white flowers and delicate, grass-like foliage. The medicinal properties of mountain starwort include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using mountain starwort include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of mountain starwort can be made by infusing the dried flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in a salve or ointment to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
